name: Sacaria
ai_summary: Sacaria has three years of childcare experience working with all age groups as a floater in a daycare center. She is passionate about working with children and is currently studying early childhood education.

transcripts.q3: My name is acharya Scott, and I've been working in the childcare for about three years. I worked with all age groups, starting from the infant's, all the way to the forest. And I was the floater around the daycare center and
transcripts.q4: I stay in Atlanta, Georgia Snellville. I would like to drive at least 20 miles.
transcripts.q6: Teaching them how to be nice to one another and avoiding any conflict.
transcripts.q7: Because I love working with kids and I feel this is a good opportunity for me to keep going and I'm already in school for the early childhood.
